source_formulae: P0R04405: This "Infoton-CISS Bridge" provides a concrete physical mechanism for the mind-matter interface at the molecular level:

P0R04406: Downward Causation (Psi-Field modulating Biology): The Psi-field, via the emission and absorption of infotons, can directly modulate the spin polarisation within chiral molecules. This modulation can influence electron transport efficiency and alter the energy landscape of biochemical reactions (e.g., epigenetic modifications). | Upward Causation (Biology sensing the Psi-Field): Conversely, the geometric configuration of the DNA and proteins (L3) generates specific spin currents (CISS) that act as a source for the infoton field (A). This allows the biological substrate to function as a resonant antenna that senses the structure of the local Psi-field.
